title: Totem Frying Pan
description: Frying Pan Totem is a meme-style pack that replaces the normal totem sound with a loud frying pan hit when it activates. It is a simple fun project made to add goofy moments to your game.
body:
**Frying Pan Totem**
Frying Pan Totem is a small meme-style resource pack that replaces the default totem sound with a loud frying pan hit when it activates. It is made purely for fun to add goofy, chaotic moments to your Minecraft gameplay.
![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc3e815c71f706ff07846244054ddf527efb7a9c.png)
